items.name_en: M62369 Embossed (〽️Grade A Full Steel〽️) Personalized Custom Version! Changeable Chip, Emilie Wallet, This Emilie wallet is crafted from Monogram Empreinte leather with a classic Monogram embossed pattern and finished with a soft contrasting grained leather lining. The wallet features an envelope-style flap with a matching button snap for a secure closure, revealing an organized interior with a large compartment, zippered coin pocket, and multiple card slots.

items.name_en: M69024💕【Special Introduction】👉Overseas Exclusive (Counter Goods)👍To continue paying tribute to the brand's design heritage, Men's Artistic Director Virgil Abloh returns to the Monogram pattern this season, creating this Multiple wallet using the brand's iconic Monogram canvas paired with natural leather. This wallet features multiple pockets and inner compartments, maintaining a compact size while offering practical internal space, easily fitting into most pockets. Dimensions: 11.5 x 9.0 x 1.5 cm ~

items.name_en: M69831 Black! The Aerogram Long Wallet reinterprets traditional men's accessories with a contemporary minimalist design. Crafted from microfiber black calfskin, it is as soft as the historic Aerogram, featuring a discreet black metal LV logo and a practical detachable wrist strap. Generous capacity with a fan-fold main compartment, 12 credit card slots, and an extra flap pocket for various items. Size: 20 x 11 x 2.5 cm.

items.name_en: M734 Top-tier Original Dynamic Code Chip Blossom Small Tote. Made from soft perforated calfskin, featuring a removable woven leather LV decoration and a perforated LV Circle pattern on the front. Use the handle or the removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap to switch between hand, elbow, shoulder, and crossbody carrying styles.
